nasb.text: But now, do consider from this day onward: before one stone was placed on another in the temple of the Lord,

esv.text: Now then, consider from this day onward. Before stone was placed upon stone in the temple of the Lord,

cnv.text: “現在你們要反省，從今日起回想過往，就是在耶和華的殿還沒有一塊石頭疊在另一塊石頭上面以前，

ccb.text: “‘从今以后，你们要回想重建耶和华殿之前的光景。
